苏寻：“我真的只想当个普通人，为什么就那么难呢？”

,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7056886361567462178","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本书还是值得一看的，在鄙人看过的所有书中，不论是情节还是剧情。都是很优秀的。里面的故事跌宕起伏。虽然当中有那么几章衔接的有点不合适。（个人感觉）但是看完了，大体非常完美（后宫文）个人感觉非常完美。虽然说还是有几个坑没有填。但是不伤大雅。期待作者的后续作品。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1643059429,"group_id":"6855234211817720845","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"专注于爽文，无法自拔。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N60xkZlZKyn52sRU1PP1nDM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8f1ab07b1e734d8198c8e9bfa665224e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791264&x-signature=yO4P%2BMjcECKIzhvBzoj72cJIxfc%3D","user_id":"103266967200","user_name":"郁城千春"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"103266967200","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6855234211817720845","book_info":{"abstract":"激活最强马甲系统，每周都能获得一个新身份。
